signals.raw: March 2026 FOMC minutes (released ~April 8) showing more officials open to 2026 rate hikes due to persistent inflation, oil/gas spikes from Iran conflict, and no cuts expected until late 2027 per markets; key rate held at 3.6%[2].

signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Buzz | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Buzz | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets as of early April 2026 focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volumes**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (priced at 29% for 180-199 tweets) and the overall "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (18% on 1080-1119 range), with real-time odds shifting on new posts amid $17.1M
